feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The not so Super, SuperBat
entry.summary:
Author: TotallyaWayne

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,071Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Bruce Wayne knew the rules of Gotham’s upper class at this point. Smile. Wave. Attend fancy parties. All so the rich can be okay with funding ‘save the world’ projects. Like his own projects, his company has been working tirelessly on. Projects he needed to be in good graces with the public for. Yes, Bruce knew Gotham’s socialite class well. But Metropolis? Their social scene was a mystery to him. Orrrrr Bruce takes his two kids to gala and things sure do wrong. Bruce and Clark have some Bi panic!!!!

entry.title: Hey Moon, the Night is Coming to an End
entry.summary:
Author: pansexual_prat

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,425Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 36

Summary: Now, he watched Clark gaze at that moment with his family, smiling fondly at the children he too had watched grow up. A sliver of afternoon sun angled itself along his eyes, the tenderness in them sending Bruce’s heart thundering. Clark looked up at the change he had surely heard, bathed in warmth and almost glowing. God, how he loved this man. Or A hit from Ivy has Clark on batsitting duty. Your regular SuperBat sickfic.

entry.title: among the stars
entry.summary:
Author: Golden_purple_angel

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,379Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: FIRST CHAPTER IS A WIP Bruce Wayne has no friends.Really?Well, as his children and colleagues have realized, he actually does. But in this story, they will find out more than just that he has friends.OrSome random people come and say that they are Bruce's friends, and if that's true, what else is he hiding from them.orOkay, I’ve been thinking about this for too long and I decided to finally write it. If it seems to you that you’ve seen some idea somewhere before, you have a 90% chance that you’re right. I apologize in advance for any character that I haven’t written completely correctly. And P.S. English is not my first language, so for most of this story I used a translator. I can read it, but I’m not the best at writing.(p.s. I am like 16 and this is my first long story so please don't be too rude)

entry.title: The day the Earth became Krypton
entry.summary:
Author: Philis283

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 81,189Chapters: 29/?Kudos: 361

Summary: Based on 'The Kryptonians who invaded Earth' the Kryptonians have run out of Omega's due to an unexplained viruses, so the travel to planets to find a comparable species which happens to be Earth. Where Kal finds his dream Omega called Bruce Wayne.

entry.title: If ever your heart stops beating I'll be there to bring you back
entry.summary:
Author: Random_Dino_Writes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,383Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 132

Summary: Bruce is suicidal, Clark can tell, and seemingly despite the vast sea of people who claim to know Bruce deeply, he's the only one. To know any more than that (being that this is a creation of the moment, unplanned and unrefined) I fear you will have to read it. Pity really.

entry.title: red, white & boy scout blue
entry.summary:
Author: mitsukiris

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,300Chapters: 9/13Kudos: 171

Summary: 'Bruce chuckles, no ounce of amusement in it, “I believe perhaps you should consider switching to water, Kent.” “Should I?” Clark asks, batting his eyelashes at Bruce. “Why? Am I offending you? Sorry I’m not obsessed with you like everyone else. I know that must be confusing for you.” “You know what?” Bruce eyes him up and down. “I think you are.” Clark is frozen. He can’t move. He blinks a few times, slowly trying to digest the words. He can’t. And Bruce? Well, Bruce’s polite smile turns smug and almost a little mean.' or: Pulitzer winning journalist Clark Kent and playboy Bruce Wayne have to pretend to be friends after one sweet incident. What will happen when this fake friendship turns into a real one? What will happen when it turns into something more?

entry.title: Out of Line
entry.summary:
Author: Undercoverweirdo6967

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,803Chapters: 3/13Kudos: 34

Summary: Tim Drake and Kon-El have managed to keep their relationship hidden for months, sneaking around behind Bruce’s back while the rest of the family remains blissfully unaware. But secrets never stay buried for long. As suspicious glances, careless slips, and undeniable clues begin piling up, Bruce starts putting the pieces together—and the fallout is anything but quiet. As the Batfamily descends into chaos over the revelation, Bruce finds himself distracted by another unexpected complication: Clark Kent seems to be getting far closer than usual, blurring lines neither of them are ready to acknowledge. Meanwhile, Gotham refuses to give anyone a break. With the Joker escaping Arkham yet again and tensions running high both at home and in the field, everyone’s already frayed nerves are pushed to their limits. Between family drama, dangerous villains, hidden feelings, and long-buried truths, chaos is inevitable.

entry.title: Everybody knows
entry.summary:
Author: LukeWinssmett

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,605Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 342

Summary: The room looks like a cell. Too clean. Too white. A simulation of comfort. Yet, enclosed in a kind of glass box, too big to hold a bed and a few basic things: it's a complete room with a metal door. And in the centre, sitting in a simple chair, is a man.At first, Conner thinks he is an employee. A technician. Someone who angered his father enough to end up locked up. Then the man raises his head. His eyes — blue, intense — open with a mixture of surprise and something more dangerous. Recognition. "Kon-El"

entry.title: How to be liked by your partner’s parent by Clark Kent
entry.summary:
Author: YoursOdi

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,727Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 142

Summary: Clark Kent is absolutely in love with Bruce Wayne and no one could ever possibly stop that love… well maybe except for his father, Thomas Wayne but Clark tries to leave a good first impression when they meet. It shouldn’t be that difficult though because Thomas only really dislikes Superman and no way in hell would Clark Kent be Super- Wait, why are you looking like that Clark? ——————A small little fic about how Thomas Wayne would react to his son being in a relationship with the Man of Steel. It got some elements from Flashpoint but you don’t have to know the lore to understand this fic (I still very recommend to watch/read it).

entry.title: Sanatorium
entry.summary:
Author: riversiders

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,887Chapters: 8/20Kudos: 112

Summary: They're forcing Bruce to rest. Tucked away on the Kents' farm in rural Kansas with Superman as his keeper, he has little choice but to cooperate. At least Dick is happy—happier. It's good for him to be around normal, well-adjusted people. They can be there for him in ways Bruce is incapable of. The more he reads of his mother's journal, the more certain he becomes; Bruce Wayne was never destined to be part of a happy family. Meanwhile, back in Gotham, the Batclub's hard at work. It'll be a dirty job, bringing Thomas Elliot to justice. Luckily, Lois, Harvey, and Selina are perfectly comfortable with the morally grey.

entry.title: A Good Manor Must Be a Little Haunted
entry.summary:
Author: Coffeetailor

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,286Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 2,027

Summary: Danny's been High King for years now. More than half his life. His parents? Reformed. His arch nemesis? Retired. The GIW? Still there, but not much of a threat anymore. Until someone got a lucky shot with a brand new, and extra nasty weapon that left Danny fighting not to just retreat into his core. Good thing Frostbite told him about a way to condense himself to save energy and heal. Sure, making himself shrink is a little weird, but as long as it gets the job done, right? A quick portal jump and he'll be home and can just rest and relax until he's strong enough to go back to normal. ...Maybe he jumped a little too far. Because he's never heard of this Gotham place, and who the heck is Batman? Wait, they've got superheros here?! (And they're cute. Oh no.)-Expect the tag list to grow as the fic does.

entry.title: Retrograde
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 104,292Chapters: 11/40Kudos: 47

Summary: A dangerous serial killer is on the loose. How will Bruce catch them when he can't remember what happened only moments ago? Bruce Wayne wakes with anterograde amnesia—twelve minutes of retention, then reset. He can't form new long-term memories, can't remember the last conversation, can't verify his own identity beyond what documentation tells him. Clark Kent loves him anyway. Loves him forty-seven times over, each reset a new choice to trust evidence instead of memory. But when renowned neuroscientist Dr. Harrison Wells is murdered using the same extraction methodology that killed twelve others, all evidence points to Bruce Wayne. Fingerprints on the equipment. DNA under the victim's fingernails. Nine hours of missing time he can't account for. Bruce doesn't remember killing him. But he doesn't remember not killing him either. Told in dual timelines—color chapters moving backward through Bruce's life with amnesia, black-and-white chapters moving forward through the investigation that preceded it—RETROGRADE is a psychological thriller about identity without memory, trust without verification, and what it means to be Batman when you can't remember being Batman.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

  • Alfred Pennyworth is the Best
  • Framed for murder
  • Inspired by Memento (2000)
  • Vulnerable Bruce Wayne
  • Protective Clark Kent

entry.title: The Great Boyfriend Investigation
entry.summary:
Author: Nigaki

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,091Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 299

Summary: Brucie Wayne is far from being boring. His social media, on the other hand, are. Until one day he posts a photo of him and his boyfriend. No one is normal about this.
